content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed the full diff for project 9ni-6-2 across 6 files (286 additions, 20 deletions). Changes cover: (1) markdown_heading_title now accepts level-1 headings and validates whitespace after hashes, with ATX closing-hash stripping, (2) MilestoneProgress::remaining() now correctly subtracts in_progress and blocked beads, (3) br list command upgraded to --all --deferred --limit=0 to capture closed/deferred beads for planned-elsewhere context, (4) br_list_exit_error_looks_corrupt no longer false-positives on missing .beads/issues.jsonl file-not-found errors, (5) planned-elsewhere summary now skips Non-goals and Acceptance Criteria labels. All 1399 tests pass. The logic is correct, edge cases are handled by saturating_sub, and both copies of markdown_heading_title in service.rs and cli/project.rs are consistent. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
